title: Emerald Standard
description: An extensive and advanced economic system, plus a few necessary add-ons to make servers enjoyable to play
body:
EmeraldStandard - Economy, Market, Credit & Treasury for Paper (1.21.11)

EmeraldStandard is a dependency-light Paper plugin for Minecraft 1.21.11 that adds a full in-game financial/economic system with:

- TPA
- Paper money banknotes
- Player-driven market + orderbook GUI
- Dynamic pricing 
- Hourly weighted difficulty randomiser

Built with a strong focus on upgrade safety (additive data migrations, no progress wipes)!

✨ Key Features
🧭 TPA System

Simple teleport request flow:

/tpa <player>

/tpaccept [player]

/tpdeny [player]

Configurable timeout.

💵 Paper Money Economy (EmeraldStandard)

A server economy using paper money notes (physical items) with $ denominations:

$1, $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500

🏦 Banking

/balance

/bank ...

Deposit/withdraw emeralds

Deposit/withdraw paper notes

📈 Player-Driven Market + Orderbook GUI

A full in-game market with supply/demand price formation:

Buy/sell orders

- Dynamic price updates from market activity
- Directly take individual orders from a GUI 
- Category/item fees & taxes (configurable)

Market GUI Includes

- Item browsing
- Buy/Sell workflows
- Market Stats GUI
- Item price displays + smoothed prices

✅ Compatibility

Paper 1.21.11

Designed to run without requiring Vault or other economy plugins

If you like deep in-game economies, player markets, the EmeraldStandard is built for exactly that.
